name: retrieve_interventions
description: Retrieve evidence-based health interventions from 17 peer-reviewed systematic reviews and meta-analyses. Given triggered metric alerts (from HealthKit on-device analysis) and/or a natural-language description of the user's situation, returns ranked intervention recommendations with full citation metadata and a ready-to-send LLM coaching prompt. Use this whenever a health metric alert fires or the user asks for evidence-backed health advice.

alerts.description: Metric alerts that have crossed their threshold on-device. Leave empty for semantic-only retrieval.

query.description: Free-text description of the user's situation for semantic retrieval, e.g. 'my HRV has been all over the place after a hard training week'. Use in addition to alerts for richer context, or alone for open-ended queries.

top_k.description: Maximum number of interventions to return from the semantic path

min_score.description: Minimum cosine similarity threshold for semantic results. Raise to 0.4+ for stricter relevance filtering.

score.description: Relevance score: 1.0 = exact alert match, <1 = cosine similarity

llm_prompt.description: Ready-to-send system+user prompt for an LLM to synthesise personalised coaching advice. Pass this directly to Claude or GPT-4. The prompt instructs the LLM to cite sources, be specific with numbers, and only address triggered metrics.
